response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software architecture, distributed systems expertise, and senior-level leadership capabilities, he lacks the specific technical foundation this role demands. His C++ experience is limited to a single year (2014–2015) at National Instruments and dormant for 11 years; his entire career trajectory since has been in web/SaaS (Node.js, TypeScript, Python). He has no industrial automation, IoT, or embedded systems background, and critically, no evidence of SDL, IEC 62443, or industrial cybersecurity expertise—all core requirements. Additionally, he does not hold the required engineering degree (B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech). This would require a fundamental career pivot, language reacquisition, and extensive domain-specific reskilling.
strengths: Proven Staff/Senior-level system architecture and design across distributed, high-performance platforms handling millions of requests per second
Deep commitment to software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, design patterns, and mentoring (organized Refactoring Dojos, taught Selenium courses)
Demonstrated adaptability across multiple tech stacks and domains (web, mobile, desktop, backend), suggesting capability to learn new systems
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and dormant for 11 years; primary skills are TypeScript/Node.js for web/SaaS, not systems programming or embedded development
Zero background in industrial automation, manufacturing, IoT, or embedded systems; all experience is cloud platforms and web services
No demonstrated knowledge of required security and industrial standards: SDL, IEC 62443, industrial cybersecurity, or industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850, DNP 3.0)

key_factors.factor: C++ and systems programming expertise gap
Industrial automation and embedded systems domain gap
